movie.title: Shivaji Surathkal (2020) Dual Audio [Hindi ORG & Kannada] WEB-DL 200MB - 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDRive | BSub
movie.synopsis: Detective Shivaji Surathkal is entrusted with the daunting task of unraveling the many mysteries in Ranagiri and the secrets that surround them. To make matters worse, he has to do all this while already dealing with severe internal conflicts.
